# Tesseract — Copilot IDE Instructions

This file supplements `AGENTS.md` (which Copilot coding agent reads automatically).

For full context routing, see `AGENTS.md` at the repository root.

## IDE-specific notes

- Scoped instructions in `.github/instructions/` are applied automatically based on `applyTo` glob patterns.
- Run `npm run refresh` before and `npm run test` after making changes.
- Read `docs/authoring.md` before making structural or architectural changes.
